items.summary: Create a global sound manager module (e.g., frontend/src/hooks/useSoundManager.ts) that uses HTML5 Audio API to play distinct sound effects for: click/button press, win, game over, score increment, and special events. Expose a global mute/unmute toggle that persists its state in localStorage.

Create a reusable DifficultySelector component styled in the dark neon theme that presents Easy / Medium / Hard options and a game title. This screen must appear before each game starts for Tic Tac Toe (SinglePlayer), Snake, and Traffic Car. The selected difficulty is passed to the game logic.

Upgrade SinglePlayer Tic Tac Toe (frontend/src/pages/SinglePlayer.tsx) with three AI difficulty modes: Easy uses fully random moves; Medium randomly mixes random and optimal moves (e.g., 50/50); Hard uses Minimax algorithm for unbeatable AI. The difficulty is set from the DifficultySelector screen.

Upgrade the Snake game (frontend/src/pages/SnakeGame.tsx) with three speed-based difficulty modes: Easy uses slow tick interval (~200ms), Medium uses normal (~130ms), Hard uses fast (~70ms). Difficulty is set from the DifficultySelector screen.

Upgrade the Traffic Car game (frontend/src/pages/TrafficCarGame.tsx) with three difficulty modes: Easy uses slow traffic speed and fewer cars; Medium uses normal speed and car density; Hard uses fast speed with more simultaneous cars. Difficulty is set from the DifficultySelector screen.
Integrate the global mute/unmute toggle button into all game pages and the Home page header/navbar area, styled consistently with the dark neon theme (e.g., a speaker icon with neon glow).
